Resources

A compact learning hub for students.

Keep these references close while you learn. They’re curated for practical Python automation and project work.

Python installation guide

Install Python, set up PATH, and confirm your environment quickly.

VS Code setup

Configure VS Code with Python extensions, code runner, and syntax helpers.

pandas, requests, BeautifulSoup, openpyxl, smtplib, schedule.

Cheat sheets

Reference quick syntax guides for Python, file handling, and data parsing.

Project submission tips
